fault_type: rrt, rrt_max, request, response, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets
symptom_vector: High network latency, increased RTT, network delay spike, elevated transmission delay, increased round-trip time, elevated round-trip duration

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component frontend and recommendationservice experienced rrt, rrt_max, request, response, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty components are frontend and recommendationservice (From Ground Truth instance list).
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword frontend in Trace data, showing latency anomalies for frontend service (From GT key_observations trace keyword).
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keywords rrt and rrt_max in Metric data, indicating abnormalities in round-trip time metrics (From GT key_observations metric keywords).

Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on trace latency anomalies and metric surges, determined cause is issues with rrt, rrt_max, request, response, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets (From GT key_metrics).

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Latency spike observed in traces from frontend to recommendationservice, e.g., normal avg duration ~120-140ms increased to ~730-735ms (From Full Context trace data).
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'frontend' in trace data during 2025-06-07T08:10:37Z to 2025-06-07T08:27:37Z to identify latency anomalies in calls involving frontend service.

critical_checks.expected_pattern: rrt metric shows significant increase, e.g., for recommendationservice-2, from 4014.78ms to 225851.24ms (193.01% change) (From Full Context metric data).
critical_checks.instruction: Check rrt metric values for services, especially recommendationservice, during the anomaly period 2025-06-07T08:10:37Z to 2025-06-07T08:27:37Z.

critical_checks.expected_pattern: rrt_max metric shows extreme surge, e.g., for recommendationservice-2, from 12932.5ms to 804041ms (193.67% change) (From Full Context metric data).
critical_checks.instruction: Check rrt_max metric values for services during the fault time 2025-06-07T08:10:37Z to 2025-06-07T08:27:37Z.
